name: codex-continuity-sync
description: Export and import portable Codex continuity packs for chats, memories, skills, and local plugin state.

interface.shortDescription: Move Codex chats, memories, and local context between machines.
interface.longDescription: Creates portable continuity packs from a Codex home directory and imports them on another machine with backups and secret-aware defaults.
defaultPrompt: Export a Codex continuity pack for this machine.
Inspect this continuity pack before importing it.
Import this continuity pack into my Codex home with backups.
